title: mentha zernestensis
intro: Mentha zernestensis, also known as Zern's mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its distinctive leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate headaches. Zern's mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a flavoring agent in culinary dishes.
